title: Jacinda Ardern becomes prime minister of New Zealand
fact: Dame Jacinda Kate Laurell Ardern is a New Zealand politician and activist who was the 40th prime minister of New Zealand and leader of the Labour Party from 2017 to 2023.

title: Christopher Luxon becomes prime minister of New Zealand
fact: Christopher Mark Luxon is a New Zealand politician and businessman who has served as the 42nd prime minister of New Zealand since 2023.

title: Chris Hipkins becomes prime minister of New Zealand
fact: Christopher John Hipkins is a New Zealand politician who has served as leader of the New Zealand Labour Party since January 2023 and leader of the Opposition since November 2023.

title: Helen Clark becomes prime minister of New Zealand
fact: Helen Elizabeth Clark is a New Zealand politician who served as the 37th prime minister of New Zealand from 1999 to 2008 and was the administrator of the United Nations Development Programme from 2009 to 2017.

title: John Key becomes prime minister of New Zealand
fact: Sir John Phillip Key is a New Zealand retired politician who served as the 38th prime minister of New Zealand from 2008 to 2016 and as leader of the National Party from 2006 to 2016.

title: Robert Muldoon becomes prime minister of New Zealand
fact: Sir Robert David Muldoon was a New Zealand politician who served as the 31st prime minister of New Zealand, from 1975 to 1984, while leader of the National Party.

title: David Lange becomes prime minister of New Zealand
fact: David Russell Lange was a New Zealand politician who served as the 32nd prime minister of New Zealand from 1984 to 1989.

title: Jenny Shipley becomes prime minister of New Zealand
fact: Dame Jennifer Mary Shipley is a New Zealand former politician who served as the 36th prime minister of New Zealand from 1997 to 1999.

title: Bill English becomes prime minister of New Zealand
fact: Sir Simon William English is a New Zealand former politician who served as the 39th prime minister of New Zealand from 2016 to 2017 and leader of the National Party from 2001 to 2003 and 2016 to 2018.

title: Michael Joseph Savage becomes prime minister of New Zealand
fact: Michael Joseph Savage was an Australian-born New Zealand politician who served as the 23rd prime minister of New Zealand, heading the First Labour Government from 1935 until his death in 1940.

title: George Grey becomes prime minister of New Zealand
fact: Sir George Grey, KCB was a British soldier, explorer, colonial administrator and writer.

title: Keith Holyoake becomes prime minister of New Zealand
fact: Sir Keith Jacka Holyoake was a New Zealand politician who served as the 26th prime minister of New Zealand, serving for a brief period in 1957 and then from 1960 to 1972, and also as the 13th governor-general of New Zealand, serving from 1977 to 1980.

title: Richard Seddon becomes prime minister of New Zealand
fact: Richard John Seddon was a New Zealand politician who served as the 15th premier of New Zealand from 1893 until his death.

title: Jim Bolger becomes prime minister of New Zealand
fact: James Brendan Bolger was a New Zealand politician of the National Party who was the 35th prime minister of New Zealand, serving from 1990 to 1997.

title: Peter Fraser becomes prime minister of New Zealand
fact: Peter Fraser was a New Zealand politician who served as the 24th prime minister of New Zealand from 27 March 1940 until 13 December 1949.

title: Mike Moore becomes prime minister of New Zealand
fact: Michael Kenneth Moore was a New Zealand politician, union organiser, and author.

title: Henry Sewell becomes prime minister of New Zealand
fact: Henry Sewell was a New Zealand politician.

title: John Ballance becomes prime minister of New Zealand
fact: John Ballance was a New Zealand politician who served as the 14th premier of New Zealand from January 1891 until his death in April 1893.
